svg.title: DevOps curriculum — beginner to advanced for software developers
svg.desc: Complete topic roadmap organized in 6 phases from Linux basics to advanced DevOps practices

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Linux basics for DevOps beginners — what to learn first?')
sendPrompt('Git branching strategies for DevOps teams')
sendPrompt('Networking basics every DevOps engineer must know')
sendPrompt('Docker fundamentals — images containers volumes networks')
sendPrompt('Dockerfile best practices — multi-stage builds slim images')
sendPrompt('Docker Compose tutorial — multi container apps')
sendPrompt('GitHub Actions complete tutorial — workflows jobs steps')
sendPrompt('How to build and push Docker image in GitHub Actions CI/CD')
sendPrompt('How to auto-deploy to VPS with GitHub Actions SSH')
sendPrompt('Nginx reverse proxy setup for multiple Docker containers')
sendPrompt('DNS setup A record CNAME subdomain complete guide')
sendPrompt('Certbot Let Encrypt free SSL setup Nginx')
sendPrompt('How to monitor Docker containers with Prometheus and Grafana')
sendPrompt('Centralized logging with Docker ELK stack or Loki')
sendPrompt('Docker security best practices — non root user secrets scanning')
sendPrompt('Kubernetes basics for developers — pods services deployments')
sendPrompt('Infrastructure as Code Terraform beginner tutorial')
sendPrompt('AWS or GCP free tier setup for DevOps learning')

g.text: Tools to practice on — one project per phase

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How to dockerize a React Node full stack app for practice')
sendPrompt('Create a GitHub Actions CI/CD pipeline for a full stack app')
sendPrompt('DevOps portfolio project ideas for beginners')

g.text: What to document in your repo (README structure)

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How to write a great DevOps README for GitHub')
sendPrompt('How to write Docker and CI/CD cheatsheets for a repo')
sendPrompt('How to add working demo to DevOps learning repo')

g.text: Click any topic to deep dive
Each box is a separate folder in your repo with notes + examples
